birthDate.title: Birth date
birthDate.hint: Your birth date is set when you create your account and is only visible to you. If it needs to be corrected, contact staff.

createCharacter.title: New character
createCharacter.nameRules: 1-40 chars: letters, numbers, _ - ' or a non-breaking space (Alt+0160). Character names can't be changed, choose wisely.
createCharacter.spaceWarning: A normal space isn't allowed, it breaks chat commands like <cmd>/whisper</cmd>. Use an underscore (<mono>_</mono>) or a non-breaking space (<key>Alt+0160</key>) instead.

displayPrivacy.intro: Per-surface controls for what other users see on your rows and profile. Saved as you toggle.

rankUserlist.label: Show my rank icon in the userlist
rankUserlist.hint: When off, your row shows the gender glyph instead of the rank gem. Takes effect immediately for every viewer.

rankChat.label: Show my rank icon on chat messages
rankChat.hint: When off, future messages you send omit the rank gem on the line. Past messages keep whatever rank was shown at the time.

displayPrivacy.countersIntro: Hide individual activity counters on your public profile. Each is independent.
displayPrivacy.rendersPrivate: Profile renders "private" instead of the number.

seed.label: Label
seed.name: Name
seed.aboutBody: Write a few lines about yourself or your character here.

role.trustedTitle: Trusted account - elevated rate limits earned through participation.

unverified.title: This account hasn't confirmed its email yet - it could be a throwaway.

actions.switchIdentityTitle: Change your active identity - chat name and theme update immediately.
actions.messageTitle: Open a direct message thread with this user.
actions.whisperTitle: Send a one-off private message in chat.
actions.ignoreTitle: Hide this user's messages from you (one-way, reversible).
actions.ignoreConfirm: Ignore {{name}}? You won't see their messages until you /unignore.
actions.blockTitle: Block: you and this user become invisible to each other everywhere.
actions.blockConfirm: Block {{name}}? You won't see each other anywhere - chat, userlist, whispers, DMs, friends, or search. Undo later in Profile -> Privacy.
actions.reportTitle: Report this profile for moderator review

familiar.patTitle: Pat this familiar, a little joy, once a day

avatar.noImageTitle: {{name}} hasn't set a main profile image yet.

gallery.empty: No additional portraits yet. Owners can add more via the profile editor's Gallery tab.
gallery.censorForYouTitle: Censor this image for you (stays hidden when you view this profile again)
gallery.markNsfwTitle: Mark this image NSFW (blurs it for viewers)
gallery.unmarkNsfwTitle: Clear the NSFW flag on this image

nsfwGate.heading: NSFW Profile
nsfwGate.bodyCharacter: {{name}}'s character profile contains content marked NSFW. Do you want to proceed? Closing this modal and re-opening will prompt again.
nsfwGate.bodyMaster: {{name}}'s profile contains content marked NSFW. Do you want to proceed? Closing this modal and re-opening will prompt again.

ageRestricted.body: This profile is marked 18+ and can't be viewed from your account.

report.heading: Report {{name}}
report.thanks: Thank you. This profile has been sent to the moderators for review.
report.hint: Flag this profile for moderator review (e.g. explicit imagery or rule-breaking content). Tell us what's wrong, optional but helpful.

hiddenFromOthers.label: Hidden from others
hiddenFromOthers.title: You can see this because it's your profile. It's hidden from everyone else.

empty.character: {{name}} hasn't filled out their character profile yet.
empty.master: {{name}} hasn't filled out their master profile yet.
empty.characterHint: They could add stats, a bio, and a main profile image to bring this character to life.

header.title: Edit profile
header.newCharacterTitle: Create a new character under your account
header.switchTitle: Switch to this character - your chat name and theme update immediately.
header.deleteTitle: Delete this character. Past message history keeps the snapshotted name.
header.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? Past chat history keeps the name; the character can't be restored.

description.htmlHint: Full HTML and CSS supported. See Help → Formatting for tags, theme colors, and the <youtube> shortcut.
description.oocPlaceholder: Time-zone, contact preferences, RP boundaries, anything OOC.

profileTab.renameBlockedHint: Renaming is blocked - message history snapshots the name at send time.
profileTab.genderHint: Renders as an icon next to your username when no character is active.
profileTab.languagesMax: You can add up to {{max}} languages.
profileTab.languagesHint: The languages you know and roleplay in. They show as flag tags at the top of your profile and your characters' profiles.
profileTab.mainImageHint: Drives the userlist icon and the modal hero.
profileTab.includeInGalleryHint: Show this image as the first tile in your profile gallery alongside any other portraits you've added. Requires a Main Profile Image URL above.

statsSection.hint: Click the eye next to a field to hide it on your public profile. The value stays saved either way.

crop.title: Avatar position
crop.loadError: Couldn't load that image, check the URL above.
crop.needUrl: Paste a Main Profile Image URL above to crop.

visibilityToggle.hideTitle: Hide "{{label}}" from your profile (value stays saved)

vibe.hint: Where does your character sit on each of these traits? Drag a slider to set the axis; unset axes don't show on your profile.

attributes.hint: Numeric stat block, D&D ability scores ("STR 14"), HP, or any custom attributes you want next to your profile. Each row sets its own min / max so different stat systems can live side by side.
attributes.empty: No attributes yet. Add one to start a stat block.
attributes.label: Label

chatColor.masterHint: Drives your OOC messages and acts as the fallback for any character without its own color.
chatColor.characterHint: Locks this character's messages to this color, regardless of the tab's /color state. Leave on "inherit" to use your OOC color.
chatColor.useDefaultTitle: Revert to the system default color

appearance.characterThemeHint: Switching to this character applies this theme to your chat. Others viewing this character's profile see it themed this way.
appearance.oocThemeHint: Applied to your chat when no character is active, and to your master profile modal.
appearance.usingDefault: Currently using the system default - change a color or pick a preset to start customizing.
appearance.themeStyleCharacterHint: Visual treatment, ornaments, borders, textures, applied when this character is active. Leave on "use default" to inherit your master account, then the theme's pinned design, then the site default.
appearance.themeStyleOocHint: Visual treatment, ornaments, borders, textures. Orthogonal to the palette above; the same style works with any colors. Leave on "use default" to follow the theme's pinned design (admin-configured per palette) and finally the site default.

bg.characterHint: Image painted behind this character's profile modal for any viewer. Leave the URL empty to use the default backdrop. Per-character, each character can carry its own scene.
bg.oocHint: Image painted behind your master / OOC profile modal for any viewer. Leave the URL empty to use the default backdrop.
bg.modeCover: Cover, fill viewport, crop to fit

banner.hint: Wide images look best. Anything taller than about 220 pixels gets trimmed down to fit.

fonts.hint: Pick a font and a size to override the defaults if the regular interface is hard to read. The Google web fonts load automatically; the rest are system fonts every OS ships with. Leave on "Default" to follow the site's built-in font.

language.hint: Applies right away and follows your account on every device - no save needed. "System default" follows your device's language. What other members wrote stays in the language they wrote it in.

visibilityRow.publicHintMaster: Anyone (including logged-out visitors) can view your master profile via {{path}}. Uncheck to require login.
visibilityRow.publicHintCharacter: Anyone (including logged-out visitors) can view this character's profile via {{path}}. Uncheck to require login.
visibilityRow.minorNsfwNote: A moderator marked this profile 18+, so it can't be public. Contact staff if you think this is a mistake.
visibilityRow.nsfwHint: Forces non-public to anonymous viewers, and shows a warning splash with a "View Profile" button to logged-in viewers before the content renders. Use when the profile itself is explicit (independent of marking individual gallery images NSFW).

dm.label: Reachable as this character
dm.hint: When on, other players can friend-request this character by name and start a DM thread with this identity. When off, this character is hidden from friend lookup and DM recipient pickers; existing friends and conversation history stay untouched, but new messages can't reach this character until you re-enable it.

notifications.hint: Toasts appear when this tab is hidden - minimized, on another tab, or in another app.
notifications.all: All messages in rooms I'm in
notifications.denied: Denied - re-enable in your browser's site permissions.

push.unsupported: Browser push isn't available in this browser.
push.title: Browser push (offline)
push.hint: Pings even when this tab is closed. Privacy: payloads carry no message body, just "whisper waiting" / "mention waiting".

sounds.hint: Per-event audio cues. Saved with the rest of your profile.
sounds.dmHint: Plays when someone DMs you, anywhere in the app.
sounds.whisperHint: Plays when someone whispers to you in chat. Distinct from DMs so an in-room whisper sounds different from a cross-room ping.
sounds.chatHint: Plays on incoming room messages and /me actions.
sounds.alertHint: Plays on admin announcements and other system events.

input.hint: Quiet down composer features you don't want to see while typing.
input.historyHint: Turns off the ArrowUp / ArrowDown recall of recently sent messages and commands in the chat composer.
input.thesaurus: Disable synonym popup on highlighted words
input.thesaurusHint: Stops the thesaurus list from appearing when you select a word inside the composer.

flair.hint: Turn off other people's animated cosmetics for a smoother, lighter experience on older devices. This only changes what you see; everyone else still shows their flair.
flair.nameStylesHint: Show everyone's name as plain text instead of their gradient, glow, or animated styles.
flair.bordersHint: Drop the decorative frames around avatars. The avatar still shows, just without the border.
flair.inlineAvatarsHint: Show the gender or rank icon next to names in chat and the userlist instead of avatar thumbnails.

earning.hint: Rank, tier, and sigil are always visible on your profile. XP and Currency totals can be hidden independently.
earning.hideCurrency: Hide my Currency total from other users
earning.hideCurrencyHint: Other users see "private" instead of your balance in /currency lookups and on your public profile.
earning.hideXp: Hide my XP total from other users
earning.hideXpHint: Other users see "private" instead of your XP on your profile and in /exp lookups.

nsfwPref.label: Hide 18+ content
nsfwPref.hint: Hides 18+ forum topics and search results, and keeps 18+ worlds, forums, and communities out of the catalogs. You can change this any time.

isolation.label: Only see members under 18 and staff
isolation.hint: Hides adult members from you, and hides you from them. This covers chat, profiles, direct messages, friends, forums, and search. Staff can always see you and help you. Rooms may look much quieter with this on. It turns off by itself when you turn 18.

blocked.hint: Blocking is mutual and global: you and a blocked user (and all of both your characters) can't see each other anywhere - chat, the userlist, whispers, DMs, friends, or search. Remove a block here to restore visibility.

password.oauthOnly: You sign in with Google and don't have a password yet. Set one now so you can still get in if you ever lose access to your Google account — right now it's your only way in.
password.changeHint: Change the password you sign in with. You'll stay signed in here; anywhere else will need the new password.
password.tooShort: Your new password must be at least 8 characters.

connected.hint: Link Google to sign in with one tap. Linking doesn't change your account's email or password, it's just another way in.

links.hint: Up to {{max}} external links rendered as styled chips on this profile. Useful for cross-site character profiles, world docs, refs. They open in a new tab.

gallery.hint: Portraits shown on this profile below the pinned Collection and Bio. The Main Profile Image above drives the userlist icon and the modal hero; tick "Include in Gallery" on the Profile tab to also surface the avatar as the first tile here without duplicating its URL. Mark a card NSFW to blur it for viewers; drag the ⠿ handle or use the ↑ ↓ buttons to reorder. Up to {{max}} portraits.
gallery.full: Gallery is full ({{max}} portraits). Remove one to add another.
gallery.removeConfirm: Remove this portrait from the gallery?
gallery.nsfwLabel: NSFW (viewers see this blurred until they reveal)
gallery.imgError: This image won't load, either the URL is broken, the host blocks hotlinking, or it requires a referrer the browser strips. Try a direct CDN link.
gallery.draftUrlPlaceholder: Paste an image URL to add a portrait…
gallery.draftImgError: Preview won't load. The portrait will still save, but viewers may not see it either, try a direct CDN link.

journal.hint: Solo writing attached to this character. Backstory, in-world diary, world notes. Public entries surface on the profile chronologically. Private entries are only visible to you.
journal.bodyPlaceholder: Write your entry here. The same HTML allow-list as your bio applies (b, i, em, p, ul/ol/li, blockquote, h3-h6, etc.).

footer.viewProfileTitle: Preview this profile as other users will see it (uses your unsaved edits).
